productDisplayName: Deni Yo Men Check Blue Short
description: Composition Blue and white check shorts made of 100% cotton, has a looped waist with a zipper fly and button closure, two cargo poackets with button closures, two patch pockets with button closures at the back and stitch detailing Fit Regular fit; Regular rise Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade This pair of shorts from Deni-yo is that perfect contour-friendly pair you have been lusting for. Designed for off-duty wear and crafted from quality cotton fabric, this piece makes for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it on a casual day out or when roughing it out in the great outdoors. Team it with funky t-shirts and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is of length 26" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
